name: polymarket_events
description: Search and browse prediction market events on Polymarket.
description_for_agent: List active prediction market events on Polymarket. Parameters: search (string, optional — filter by tag/topic), limit (integer, optional, default 20, max 100), active (bool, default true), closed (bool, default false). Returns events with title, markets, odds/prices, volume, liquidity. Use this when user asks about prediction markets, current events, odds, or betting opportunities.
